raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>2025 I placed an order for Medical Equipment, called XXXX XXXX thru XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX for the amount of {$990.00} but right after I paid this {$990.00} using Citi Bank Credit I opened XXXX and wanted to ask XXXX XXXX XXXX some questions and found out all conversation in text between me and XXXX XXXX were deleted. I then file a dispute with Citi Bank right away in the same day I placed this order, about a week later I received small package when It was an XX/XX/XXXX with XX/XX/XXXX language. I was asked to send all documents about this Fraud purchase and I did send it all to Citi Bank Dispute Center, Yesterday I called them more than one time and was told I have to pay for this amount of {$990.00}. I disagreed with them, I pay for the XX/XX/XXXX and received something else ( Cheap ) please help me to fix this problem, I am the Victim of this Fraud and I notified them right away They, CitiBand need to pull back this amount {$990.00}. Thank you in advance
